subject: [PATCH v6 1/2] firmware_loader: add search_path= module option for multi-path firmware lookup

2026-04-01.patch_summary: This patch adds a new module option called firmware_class.search_path to the Linux kernel's firmware loader. This option allows users to specify multiple paths where the firmware should be searched, separated by colons. The input is preprocessed at boot time or when sysfs is written to avoid parsing overhead. Backslash escapes are supported for literal colon and backslash characters. The firmware lookup order remains unchanged, with built-in default paths taking precedence over user-specified paths.
